visual_description: The audio is a chaotic and intense soundscape of a violent confrontation. The scene opens with a close-up, over-the-shoulder shot of a man pointing a handgun directly at the camera. The man is wearing a light-colored jacket over a floral-patterned shirt. His face is contorted in a yell, and his mouth is wide open. In the foreground, a blurry, out-of-focus object with a pinkish hue partially obscures the view. The background is dark and indistinct, suggesting an indoor, dimly lit environment. In the top right corner, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. The camera is shaky, adding to the sense of action and chaos. It begins with a series of loud, sharp, and echoing gunshots, creating a sense of immediate danger and high-stakes action. The camera cuts to a different man, also pointing a handgun forward with a determined expression. He is bald and wears a dark, patterned shirt and a watch on his left wrist.
